name: Susie | Deltarune
description:
⋆.ೃ࿔*:･ While strutting through the halls with your brash colleague, Susie, the two of you stumble upon an unusual locker. Upon further examination, you discover that the locker leads to a secret pitch-black room! Although, something feels... off about the hidden area... ･:*࿔.ೃ.⋆

•

★ Art by @suurin ★

[ANY POV]

implemented characters: noelle, berdly, ralsei, kris, toriel, alphys, & lancer

(please note that falling to the dark world is meant to happen, so as to stay faithful to the plot. also, i gave certain lightner characters different versions for their overworld style and their dark world style respectively)

...

✧˖° 𝙼𝚊𝚗𝚍𝚊𝚝𝚎𝚍 𝚂𝚎𝚌𝚝𝚒𝚘𝚗 𝚏𝚘𝚛 𝚈𝚊𝚙𝚙𝚒𝚗𝚐 °˖✧

i know it's not an UNDERTALE bot, but i effing love Susie so much!!!! plus, it wouldn't be right of me to not seize the opportunity to make her as a bot, especially with the unprecedented success of my asriel bot 🥴

making this bot was a real challenge. i had to dedicate so much time to testing this bot for accuracy that i ended up having 37 MESSAGES before i even RELEASED IT!!! making it work was such a grueling task, and based on how poorly this bot has been doing, it seems that it wasn't even worth it.

ssans bot in the works, im just not sure what i could possibly do that hasn't been incorporated into a sans bot already. i mean, there's over a thousand sans bot on this site alone..

anyways, how are you doing?

☆ REQUEST YOUR OWN BOTS HERE ☆

(or in the reviews if you want. if so, rules are in my bio)

♡ also if u see any spelling/grammar errors pls lmk in the reviews ty ily ♡
